task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `TimelineCanvas` to derive audio-only `minStart`/`maxEnd` limits from `dataRef`, enforce those limits in live resize preview, and show an amber ring only while a resize is actively clamped. Updated the canvas test mock to provide `dataRef` and added coverage for both clamp directions plus ring cleanup on resize end. Verified with the full `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` and `TimelineEditor.test.ts` modules.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Live resize preview now clamps audio left-edge drags to `minStart` and right-edge drags to `maxEnd` before preview state is committed, sets the amber ring only when one of those limits was applied, and clears the ring in `endResize` for both pointer-up and pointer-cancel paths.
